docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROCKS, BRENDAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTOX, LISA $3,763.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,763.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,763.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ROCKS, BRENDAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED AUG-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOX, LISA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,488.00 FILED BY ROCKS, BRENDAN AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOX, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
